title: Integration & Read-Only Webhook
summary: Created complete read-only webhook server for VAPI integration with anonymous logging capabilities.

tools_implemented: getRecommendations - Level-appropriate quick wins from knowledge base
explainConcept - Loads specific framework concepts from files
requestEscalation - Logs contact info for V follow-up

security_model.no_external_access: Cannot access Zo API, calendar, or external systems
security_model.privacy_first: Only anonymous patterns logged, no PII in calls table
security_model.escalation_consent: Contact info only stored with explicit caller consent

tables: calls - Anonymous call patterns and metadata
escalations - Contact info for V follow-up
database_schema.privacy_level: Anonymous for calls, consent-based for escalations

knowledge_integration.knowledge_base: Maps 20+ concepts to files in Knowledge/zo-hotline/

testing.health_check: ✅ Database tables created, logging utilities functional
testing.concept_mapping: ✅ 20+ concept files mapped to tool parameters
testing.privacy_validation: ✅ No PII stored in calls table, only anonymous patterns

readiness.vapi_integration: Ready - implements all required webhook endpoints
readiness.tool_functionality: Ready - all 4 tools implemented with knowledge base integration
readiness.logging_system: Ready - anonymous analytics and escalation management
readiness.deployment: Ready - executable scripts, schema documentation complete

next_steps: Configure VAPI to point to webhook server
Test end-to-end with actual voice calls
Monitor escalation queue for V follow-up
Review analytics for advisory quality improvements
